Skip to contents
SCP 0.1.2
  • Reference

    Annotate single cells using similarity.

    RunKNNPredict.Rd

    Annotate single cells using similarity.

    Usage

    RunKNNPredict(
  srt_query,
  srt_ref = NULL,
  bulk_ref = NULL,
  query_group = NULL,
  ref_group = NULL,
  query_assay = NULL,
  ref_assay = NULL,
  query_reduction = NULL,
  ref_reduction = NULL,
  query_dims = ref_dims,
  ref_dims = 1:30,
  query_collapsing = !is.null(query_group),
  ref_collapsing = TRUE,
  return_full_distance_matrix = FALSE,
  features = NULL,
  features_type = c("HVF", "DE"),
  feature_source = "both",
  nfeatures = 2000,
  DEtest_param = list(max.cells.per.ident = 200, test.use = "wilcox"),
  DE_threshold = "p_val_adj < 0.05",
  nn_method = NULL,
  distance_metric = "cosine",
  k = 30,
  filter_lowfreq = 0,
  prefix = "knnpredict",
  force = FALSE
)

    Arguments

    srt_query

    A seurat object.

    bulk_ref

    A cell atlas matrix, e.g., SCP::ref_scHCL

    query_assay

    assay used in the srt_query

    DE_threshold

    Threshold used to filter the DE features. Default is "p_val < 0.05". If using "roc" test, DE_threshold should be needs to be reassigned. e.g. "power > 0.5"

    k

    Number of predictions to return.

    force

    Whether to force to annotate when data type is different.

    method

    Method used to measure cell similarity. Can be one of similarity metrics: cosine, correlation, jaccard, ejaccard, dice, edice, hamman, simple matching, faith, or distance metrics: euclidean, chisquared, kullback, manhattan, maximum, canberra, minkowski, hamming.

    query_slot

    slot used in the srt_query

    Examples

    # Annotate cells using bulk RNA-seq data
data("pancreas1k")
pancreas1k <- Standard_SCP(pancreas1k)
#> [2022-06-14 05:14:44] Start Standard_SCP
#> [2022-06-14 05:14:44] Checking srtList... ...
#> Data 1/1 of the srtList is raw counts. Perform NormalizeData(logCPM) on the data ...
#> Perform FindVariableFeatures on the data 1/1 of the srtList...
#> Use the separate HVF from the existed HVF in srtList...
#> [2022-06-14 05:14:46] Finished checking.
#> Perform ScaleData on the data...
#> Perform linear dimension reduction (pca) on the data...
#> Perform FindClusters (louvain) on the data...
#> Reorder clusters...
#> Perform nonlinear dimension reduction (umap) on the data...
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> Found more than one class "dist" in cache; using the first, from namespace 'BiocGenerics'
#> Also defined by ‘spam’
#> [2022-06-14 05:15:07] Standard_SCP done
#> Elapsed time: 22.67 secs 
pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, bulk_ref = SCP::ref_scMCA)
#> Use 535 common features to calculate distance.
#> Detected query data type: log_normalized_counts
#> Detected reference data type: log_normalized_counts
#> Calculate similarity...
#> Use 'raw' method to find neighbors.
#> Predict cell type...
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE)
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on '5: β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>


# Removal of low credible cell types from the predicted results
pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, bulk_ref = SCP::ref_scMCA, filter_lowfreq = 30)
#> Use 535 common features to calculate distance.
#> Detected query data type: log_normalized_counts
#> Detected reference data type: log_normalized_counts
#> Calculate similarity...
#> Use 'raw' method to find neighbors.
#> Predict cell type...
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE, label_insitu = TRUE)
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <ce>
#> Warning: conversion failure on 'β-cell(Pancreas)(31)' in 'mbcsToSbcs': dot substituted for <b2>


# Annotate clusters using bulk RNA-seq data
pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, query_group = "SubCellType", bulk_ref = SCP::ref_scMCA)
#> Use 535 common features to calculate distance.
#> Detected query data type: log_normalized_counts
#> Detected reference data type: log_normalized_counts
#> Calculate similarity...
#> Use 'raw' method to find neighbors.
#> Predict cell type...
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE)


# Annotate using single cell RNA-seq data
library(stringr)
library(SeuratData)
#> Error in library(SeuratData): there is no package called ‘SeuratData’
suppressWarnings(InstallData("panc8"))
#> Error in InstallData("panc8"): could not find function "InstallData"
data("panc8")
#> Warning: data set ‘panc8’ not found

# Simply convert genes from human to mouse and preprocess the data
genenm <- make.unique(str_to_title(rownames(panc8)))
#> Error in h(simpleError(msg, call)): error in evaluating the argument 'x' in selecting a method for function 'rownames': object 'panc8' not found
panc8 <- RenameFeatures(panc8, newnames = genenm)
#> Error in is(x, "classRepresentation"): object 'panc8' not found

panc8 <- check_srtMerge(panc8, batch = "tech")[["srtMerge"]]
#> Error in check_srtMerge(panc8, batch = "tech"): object 'panc8' not found
pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8, ref_group = "celltype")
#> Error in RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8, ref_group = "celltype"): object 'panc8' not found
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE)

ExpDimPlot(pancreas1k, features = "knnpredict_simil")


pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(
  srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8,
  ref_group = "celltype", ref_collapsing = FALSE
)
#> Error in RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8, ref_group = "celltype",     ref_collapsing = FALSE): object 'panc8' not found
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE)

ExpDimPlot(pancreas1k, features = "knnpredict_prob")
#> Warning: knnpredict_prob are not in the features of srt.
#> Error in plist[[1]]: subscript out of bounds

pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(
  srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8,
  query_group = "SubCellType", ref_group = "celltype",
  query_collapsing = TRUE, ref_collapsing = TRUE
)
#> Error in RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8, query_group = "SubCellType",     ref_group = "celltype", query_collapsing = TRUE, ref_collapsing = TRUE): object 'panc8' not found
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE)

ExpDimPlot(pancreas1k, features = "knnpredict_simil")


# Annotate with DE gene instead of HVF
pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(
  srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8,
  ref_group = "celltype",
  features_type = "DE", feature_source = "ref"
)
#> Error in RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8, ref_group = "celltype",     features_type = "DE", feature_source = "ref"): object 'panc8' not found
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE)

ExpDimPlot(pancreas1k, features = "knnpredict_simil")


pancreas1k <- RunKNNPredict(
  srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8,
  query_group = "SubCellType", ref_group = "celltype",
  features_type = "DE", feature_source = "both"
)
#> Use the DE features from AllMarkers_wilcox to calculate distance metric.
#> DE features number of the query data: 1999
#> Error in RunKNNPredict(srt_query = pancreas1k, srt_ref = panc8, query_group = "SubCellType",     ref_group = "celltype", features_type = "DE", feature_source = "both"): object 'panc8' not found
ClassDimPlot(pancreas1k, group.by = "knnpredict_classification", label = TRUE)

ExpDimPlot(pancreas1k, features = "knnpredict_simil")
